fields.acceptance_criteria: 1. The frontend can request a workspace graph payload rather than only a fixed-depth root subgraph. 2. The payload supports focus changes without refetching a new root-local graph on every selection. 3. The payload preserves relationship metadata needed for efficient focus highlighting and culling.
fields.title: [ticket-http][ticket-viewer] Expose workspace graph payload for focused full-graph navigation

fields.implementation_summary: Ticket-http now exposes a workspace-scoped graph payload and ticket-viewer fetches and caches that payload by workspace, so focus changes can reuse one graph dataset instead of refetching root-local subgraphs. Focused HTTP and release E2E coverage were updated for the new route and graph-mode selection flow.
fields.title: [ticket-http][ticket-viewer] Expose workspace graph payload for focused full-graph navigation
fields.validation_summary: Passed cargo test -p ticket-http workspace_graph_includes_isolated_local_and_cross_workspace_nodes -- --nocapture; cargo check --manifest-path memory-viewers/ticket-viewer/frontend/dioxus/Cargo.toml; cargo build --manifest-path memory-viewers/ticket-viewer/Cargo.toml --release; viewer-ctl install ticket-viewer; npm run test:e2e:release -- graph3d-fetch-error.spec.ts; npm run test:e2e:release -- graph-detail-sidebar.spec.ts.

fields.title: [ticket-http][ticket-viewer] Expose workspace graph payload for focused full-graph navigation
fields.validation_summary: Previous validation included targeted ticket-http coverage, frontend cargo check, release build, and release Playwright graph flows. Revalidated 2026-05-31: cargo test -p ticket-http workspace_graph_includes_isolated_local_and_cross_workspace_nodes -- --nocapture passed; cargo check --manifest-path memory-viewers/ticket-viewer/frontend/dioxus/Cargo.toml passed; cargo build --manifest-path memory-viewers/ticket-viewer/Cargo.toml --release passed; Edge-backed Playwright reruns passed for e2e-release/graph3d-fetch-error.spec.ts and graph-detail-sidebar.spec.ts -g "clicking a graph node updates the detail pane without changing the main ticket route". Shared layout-default regression remains tracked separately under ticket 60092819.
